name: Priya Ramesh
testimonial: The placement cell at Kingston gave me structured mock interviews and communication workshops. The sessions with industry mentors helped me crack my Cognizant interview with confidence.

name: Arun Kumar S
testimonial: Joining TCS as a Digital Analyst was a dream come true. The AI & ML curriculum at KEC gave me a strong foundation in Python and data science, which was directly relevant to my role.

name: Deepika Nair
testimonial: KEC's campus placement drives and aptitude training programs were exactly what I needed. The exposure to real placement scenarios made me thoroughly prepared for the Infosys recruitment process.

name: Vikram S
testimonial: I never imagined landing a core engineering role straight from campus. The lab infrastructure at KEC and the guidance from my faculty in final year helped me prepare a strong project portfolio.

name: Kavya Menon
testimonial: The placement team organized a 10-week pre-placement bootcamp covering data structures, aptitude and HR rounds. That intensive preparation gave me the edge I needed to secure Accenture.

name: Mohamed Siddiq
testimonial: Deloitte was my dream company and KEC made it possible. The focus on problem-solving and competitive coding during my final year, combined with mock interviews, prepared me exceptionally well.

name: Sowmiya R
testimonial: Kingston's emphasis on communication and soft skills was a big differentiator. The Capgemini HR round was challenging, but the personality development sessions at KEC had prepared me really well.

name: Rahul Anand
testimonial: Getting placed in a core mechanical role was challenging. The placement director's industry network and dedicated coaching for core engineering companies helped me land my role at L&T.
